Su Bo ŤėášľĮ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Su Bo (ŤėášľĮ). Rose in revolt in Ji and You with Tian Yin, defeated by wei general Jia Xin. Su Bo lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
